with these features and more

theme customizer

Zoom is integrated into EduBlink to help schools, organizations to enhance their online programs. Learners can access.

Install edubin theme with one-click
importer theme customizer

Expore Unlimited
color options

Features

Key Features

Take your site to the next level
with these features and more

One Click
Demo Import

Elementor
Page Builder

Free Google
Fonts

Powerful Admin
Panel

Fast page load
speed

Drag & Drop
page builder

SEO
Friendly

WP Events
Manager

Courses

Course Pages

Take your site to the next level
with these features and more

Filter

Course Filter

Easily Find Courses with Edubin Advanced Filters

Take use of Edubin's sophisticated course filtering features to create a customized learning experience. Find courses that are suited to your requirements and interests by quickly narrowing down your search by categories, tags, teachers, and price.

Zoom Meeting

Zoom Integreted

Video Conferencing with Zoom Meeting

Edubin seamlessly integrates Zoom, empowering educational institutions and organizations to elevate their online programs. Students gain convenient access to high-quality video sessions via desktop and mobile devices. Simplify the creation of virtual classrooms through direct integration from your LMS to Zoom Meetings.

Elementor

Page Builder

Drag & Drop Elementor
Page Builder

Your one-stop education solution is Edubin. It's constructed by Elementor. This theme transforms online learning management systems with its more than 50+ bespoke Elementor widgets. With worldwide fonts and colors, responsive design, and unique positioning for every part of the website, you may create the website of your dreams.

Inner Pages

Inner Pages

Predefined Pages your site can be
built in less than time

Trusted By

0 k+

This theme is very well documented and comes with many features with number of useful plugins. The best thing I've found is their customer support. Their support is very friendly and prompt.

Mitukar

Not only is one of the best Themes in themeforest also their costumer support its amazing and for real they helped me a lot. Thanks guys for an amazing theme

Marcosvizquel

Personally I'm super impressed with their service and my wife simply loves the theme with it's sleek layout for all her courses. Had a few minor issues setting it up but within 24 hours from sending them a message the issue was resolved without a hassle on our end. That means a lot!!! Thank you Edubin staff and designers, you guys rock! :)

InternetMarketingLight

I bought this theme 3 days ago - and the support has been really lovely. As of now; it is a 5 Star - I hope this remains in the long run, because I have had many themes (I have been on themeforest for nearly ten years) where things go south and I - being an honest, practical and pragmatic buyer - have to change my review rating to reflect the true experience and producct. And because I want these guys to do well, and with the experience I am getting for the first few days; I recommend. Please keep this standard/level guys, and make us your fans. Because so many of us want to be loyal to the same people/developers. Thank you for excellent support, and so far, a wonderful theme.

Stageforkids

I reported few technical support tickets and happy to share the nice experience where team resolved

Sunilshahi

Have A Question?

How to open a ticket and get support?

To open a ticket for support, visit our official support website. or the marketplace where you purchased it. Look for a "Support" or "Contact" section, and follow the provided instructions to submit your request. Be sure to provide detailed information about your issue or question to help the support team assist you effectively. Keep an eye on your email for updates on your ticket status and any further instructions from the support team.

Why I use Edubin WordPress theme?

The Edubin WordPress theme is commonly used for creating websites focused on education and online learning. It's utilized by educational institutions, teachers, tutors, and organizations offering online courses. With its user-friendly interface, customizable features, and integration with Learning Management System plugins, Edubin facilitates the creation of professional and engaging educational websites.

What is Edubin & how to install it?

Edubin is a WordPress theme for educational websites, featuring responsive design, course management tools, and seamless LMS integration for easy online learning platform creation. To Install Edubin you need to purchase the theme from ThemeForest and follow our Documentation.

How long will I receive updates after purchase?

If you purchase the Edubin theme, you'll receive updates for as long as the theme is actively supported by the developer. Typically, updates include bug fixes, feature enhancements, and compatibility improvements to ensure the theme remains functional and secure. You can check the developer's support policy for specific details on update frequency and duration of support after purchase. Start your journey with edubin

to open a ticket and get support?","accordion_content":"\nTo open a ticket for support, visit our official <strong><a href=\"https:\/\/thepixelcurve.com\/support\/\">support website<\/a>.<\/strong> or the marketplace where you purchased it. Look for a \"Support\" or \"Contact\" section, and follow the provided instructions to submit your request. Be sure to provide detailed information about your issue or question to help the support team assist you effectively. Keep an eye on your email for updates on your ticket status and any further instructions from the support team.","_id":"280f86d"},{"accordion_title":"Why I use Edubin WordPress theme?","accordion_content":"The Edubin WordPress theme is commonly used for creating websites focused on education and online learning. It's utilized by educational institutions, teachers, tutors, and organizations offering online courses. With its user-friendly interface, customizable features, and integration with Learning Management System plugins, Edubin facilitates the creation of professional and engaging educational websites.","_id":"c773f81"},{"accordion_title":"What is Edubin & how to install it?","accordion_content":"Edubin is a WordPress theme for educational websites, featuring responsive design, course management tools, and seamless LMS integration for easy online learning platform creation. <strong>To Install Edubin<\/strong> you need to purchase the theme from ThemeForest and follow our <strong><a href=\"https:\/\/thepixelcurve.com\/support\/docs\/edubin\/\">Documentation<\/a>.<\/strong>","_id":"e62e198"},{"accordion_title":"How long will I receive updates after purchase?","accordion_content":"If you purchase the Edubin theme, you'll receive updates for as long as the theme is actively supported by the developer. Typically, updates include bug fixes, feature enhancements, and compatibility improvements to ensure the theme remains functional and secure. You can check the developer's support policy for specific details on update frequency and duration of support after purchase.","_id":"c5d3f74"}],"title_typography_typography":"custom","title_typography_text_transform":"none","accordion_title_padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"20","isLinked":false},"accordion_icon_box_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"25","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"accordion_title_border_border":"none"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"demo-accordion"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":false},{"id":"65d401f","elType":"container","settings":{"flex_direction":"column","background_background":"classic","background_color":"#051224","shape_divider_top":"tilt","shape_divider_top_height":{"unit":"px","size":70,"sizes":[]},"shape_divider_top_flip":"yes","padding":{"unit":"px","top":"220","right":"0","bottom":"220","left":"0","isLinked":false},"z_index":1,"overflow":"hidden","padding_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"220","right":"0","bottom":"139","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"904a1fa","elType":"widget","settings":{"subtitle":"Start
